notes: Acted-as-LLM (Claude Opus 4.7 in-session) for POC + query generation; in D3-main these become API calls.
POC structurally mirrors rep2 (faithful to the patch's buggy form: early returns from kmalloc-fail without of_node_put). First POC passed verifier-v1 strictly.

compile_iters=2: initial query was function-wide presence-of-of_node_put (too lenient -- _buggy has of_node_put on success path so reported nothing); refined to path-sensitive CFG-based 'return reachable from acquire without intervening put', then added null-check return filter to suppress the if(!sink) return path (which would have fired inside _fixed at line 98).
rep3 variance: path-sensitive (CFG-reachability) formulation rather than the function-wide presence check used in lin-1-repN.
